What we do

Our paving and groundworks services

From driveways to full landscaping, we deliver hard-wearing, great-looking results built on solid foundations.

Block Paving Driveways

Durable, low-maintenance driveways in a wide range of block styles, colours and patterns.

Patios and Paving

Beautiful patios and garden paving that create the perfect space to relax and entertain.

Natural Stone and Porcelain

Premium Indian sandstone, limestone and porcelain for a high-end, lasting finish.

Groundworks and Excavation

Full site preparation, excavation and levelling with our own mini-digger and plant.

Turfing and Landscaping

Fresh turf, raised beds and complete garden makeovers to finish your project off.

Drainage and Foundations

Compliant drainage, sub-bases and foundations that keep your surface solid for years.

[CONFIRM] Service list above is standard for your trade based on the photos. Tell me the exact 6 you want.

Before and after

Transformations

Watch tired outdoor spaces become something special. Each project filmed from start to finish.

PROJECT 01

Cracked Crazy Paving to Charcoal Block Driveway

This tired, patched-up crazy paving had seen better days. We lifted the lot, excavated and compacted a fresh sub-base, then laid charcoal block paving framed with a contrasting silver-grey border - a crisp, low-maintenance driveway that lifts the whole front of the house.

Why choose Creative Paving Solutions

20 years of experience

Two decades of driveways, patios and groundworks means we get it right first time.

Own plant and machinery

Our own diggers and equipment keep projects moving, tidy and on schedule.

Quality materials

Premium blocks, natural stone and porcelain built on properly prepared foundations.

Local and trusted

A familiar face across Welwyn Garden City, Hertford, St Albans and North London.

Free, honest quotes

Clear, no-obligation pricing with no hidden extras and no pressure.

Fully insured

Every job covered and completed to a standard we are proud to put our name to.

Meet the team

Local, hands-on and here for the long run

Creative Paving Solutions has spent over 20 years transforming driveways, patios and gardens across Welwyn Garden City, Hertford, St Albans and North London.

We run our own plant and machinery, take on every job personally, and treat every project like it is our own home. From the first dig to the final block, the same team sees it through.
